heading: Hard white wheat development program
label: 8787 Hard white wheat development program
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246

Effective DateEnactment of this section and repeal of by effective , the date of enactment of , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4 of Pub. L. 110–246section 8701 of this titleMay 22, 2008

children.label: B
children.text: of a variety that is suitable for the State in which the seed will be planted;

children.label: C
children.text: rated at least superior with respect to quality; and

children.label: D
children.text: specifically approved under a seed establishment program established by the State Department of Agriculture and the State Wheat Commission of the 1 or more States in which the seed will be planted.

children.heading: Program
children.label: 2 Program
children.text: The term “program” means the hard white wheat development program established under subsection (b)(1).

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture, in consultation with the State Departments of Agriculture and the State Wheat Commissions of the States in regions in which hard white wheat is produced, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations, the Secretary shall establish a hard white wheat development program in accordance with paragraph (2) to promote the establishment of hard white wheat as a viable market class of wheat in the United States by encouraging production of at least 240,000,000 bushels of hard white wheat by 2012.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Subject to subparagraphs (B) and (C) and subsection (c), if funds are made available for any of the 2009 through 2012 crops of hard white wheat, the Secretary shall make available incentive payments to producers of those crops.

children.heading: Acreage limitation
children.label: B Acreage limitation
children.text: The Secretary shall carry out subparagraph (A) subject to a regional limitation determined by the Secretary on the number of acres for which payments may be received that takes into account planting history and potential planting, but does not exceed a total of 2,900,000 acres or the equivalent volume of production based on a yield of 50 bushels per acre.

children.label: i
children.text: in an amount that is not less than $0.20 per bushel; and

children.label: ii
children.text: in an amount that is not less than $2.00 per acre for planting eligible hard white wheat seed.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $35,000,000 for the period of fiscal years 2009 through 2012.
